Geography sets the terms of the work. Portland Estates is part of a harbour city: the Halifax Harbour waterfront and green spaces like Point Pleasant Park sit minutes away, and the same ocean that built the region's shipbuilding and ocean-science industries also writes its maintenance calendar. Salt-laden air corrodes exposed metal and wears exterior finishes faster than inland owners ever experience. Ocean winds drive rain sideways into joints, seams, and flashing. And Maritime winters cycle through freeze and thaw repeatedly rather than freezing once and staying frozen — the exact pattern that opens cracks, lifts surfaces, and finds every weak point left behind by a rushed job. Effective {SERVICE} in Portland Estates means planning for all three, every season.
